## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs

## Testing

Describe exactly how this was tested.

## Screenshots / Recording (UI changes)

Attach before/after screenshots or a short video.

## Checklist

- [ ] I rebased on latest `dev`
- [ ] I kept this PR focused
- [ ] I updated docs (if behavior changed)
- [ ] I included test steps
- [ ] No sensitive tokens/secrets added
